channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IEBC opens temporary recruitment for election officials in Ol Kalou ahead of July 16 by-election
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has announced a series of temporary job opportunities in Ol Kalou constituency as preparations intensify for the by-election scheduled for Ju...

item.title: Teodoro questions sources of reports on alleged civilian casualties in Toboso encounter
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. has dismissed allegations claiming that civilians were among the casualties in a reported encounter in Toboso, Negros Occidental. The incident, which involved go...

item.title: Overview of Nigerian celebrity baby announcements and births in 2026
item.description: The report highlights a wave of joyful baby announcements and births among Nigerian celebrities in 2026, showing a year filled with family milestones and emotional moments. One of the early highlights...

item.title: Prince William Says He Hopes to Attend Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Rumored Wedding
item.description: Prince William said during an appearance on Heart Breakfast that he hopes to receive an invitation to the rumored wedding of pop superstar Taylor Swift and NFL player Travis Kelce. The prince spoke op...

item.title: Frederiksen invited to restart coalition talks after Danish government negotiations stall
item.description: Denmark’s political negotiations have entered a new phase after King Frederik asked caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen to make another attempt at forming a government. This follows the collaps...

item.title: Salem Railway Division intensifies action and awareness campaigns against stone-pelting on trains
item.description: The Railway Protection Force (RPF) of the Salem Railway Division has issued a strong warning against incidents of stone-pelting on moving trains, stating that such acts are dangerous and punishable un...

item.title: Curated roundup of the best Memorial Day 2026 sales across major retailers and categories
item.description: The article presents a comprehensive roundup of Memorial Day 2026 sales curated by CNN Underscored’s deals team. It highlights that 172 notable discounts are currently available across major retailers...

item.title: Saad Edhi returns to Karachi after release following interception of Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Humanitarian worker Saad Edhi, grandson of renowned philanthropist Abdul Sattar Edhi, has returned to Karachi after being released from Israeli detention following the interception of a Gaza-bound hum...

item.title: Plastic surgeons report rising patient requests based on AI-generated facial ideals
item.description: Plastic surgeons are reporting a growing trend of patients arriving at consultations with expectations shaped by artificial intelligence tools, often bringing AI-generated images of their desired appe...

item.title: MS NOW Host Reacts to Controversial Andy Barr Campaign Ad Focused on DEI and Identity Messaging
item.description: MS NOW host Jonathan Capehart expressed shock and disbelief after viewing a controversial campaign advertisement from Kentucky Republican Congressman Andy Barr, who is running for the U.S. Senate seat...

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson to hold private Bahamas wedding after White House venue rejected
item.description: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson are set to celebrate their marriage with an intimate ceremony on a private island in the Bahamas. According to sources cited in the report, Anderson initially exp...

item.title: Essex driver fined after using vehicle horn to attract a friend near train station
item.description: A 52-year-old driver from Essex has received a criminal conviction and been ordered to pay a total of £266 in fines and court costs after using his vehicle horn to attract the attention of a friend. J...

item.title: Online campaign intensifies pressure on Australia’s gas tax system
item.description: The article examines how an online movement campaigning for changes to Australia’s Petroleum Resource Rent Tax (PRRT) has gained momentum through social media and political frustration over low tax re...

item.title: Opinion: Viral bhangra dancing video sparks debate on immigration and cultural integration in Canada
item.description: This opinion article discusses a viral social media controversy sparked by a short video showing two Indian-Canadian men joyfully performing bhangra in the snow while wearing Montreal Canadiens hockey...

item.title: Lewis Capaldi says Sam Fender and Grian Chatten encouraged him to take more creative risks in the studio
item.description: Lewis Capaldi has spoken about the influence that his friendships with Sam Fender and Fontaines D.C. frontman Grian Chatten have had on his recent approach to music and songwriting. In an interview wi...

item.title: Weekly Canadian business update: Tim Hortons expansion, new CRTC streaming rules, and Newfoundland–Quebec energy negotiations
item.description: This weekly business digest highlights several major developments across Canada’s corporate, regulatory, and energy sectors. Restaurant Brands International has announced an expansion plan for Tim Hor...

item.title: DCI arrests suspect over KSh 7.5 million fake gold fraud targeting retired teacher
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has arrested a suspect linked to a sophisticated fake gold investment scam that defrauded a 61-year-old retired teacher of more than KSh 7.5 million. T...

item.title: NBI labels Senator Bato dela Rosa ‘armed and dangerous’ as ICC warrant manhunt continues
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has officially classified Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa as “armed and dangerous” as authorities continue efforts to serve an arrest warrant issued by the I...

item.title: The financial and personal risks behind side hustles in South Africa
item.description: South Africa’s evolving economic landscape has seen a sharp rise in side hustles and gig work as households grapple with high debt levels and persistently low savings. According to the South African R...

item.title: Northeast troops neutralise six insurgents, rescue abducted victims and recover explosives in Borno and Yobe operations
item.description: Troops under Operation Hadin Kai and Operation Desert Sanity recorded major operational successes across Borno and Yobe states after carrying out coordinated offensives against suspected Boko Haram an...
